arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim responds to one of the biggest criticisms of his Man United reign and insists he IS making the team better ahead of trip to in-form Everton
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim insists he is flexible over his football beliefs, but admits there are 'more problems than solutions' at Man United at the moment. Amorim has been criticised for being too stubborn over tactics.

arts.ttl: Report: Ruben Amorim makes priority clear as Man United set sights on €75m striker
arts.sum: Manchester United has set its sights on Victor Osimhen as their primary target for the upcoming summer transfer window. Currently on loan at Galatasaray, United’s focus remains firmly on Osimhen, according to GiveMeSport. arts.ttl: Man Utd plot STUNNING Rashford swap transfer for Bayern Munich wonderkid
arts.sum: Rashford is currently on loan at Aston Villa, who have a buy option of more than €40 million on the 27-year-old, and has impressed in his first two appearances for the club, seemingly encouraging United of a market to sell him if he returns to Old Trafford in the summer. Manchester United are reportedly exploring an ambitious transfer that would see Marcus Rashford move to Bayern Munich this summer in exchange for one of the German side’s brightest wonderkids.
